title: Iito/spindll
summary: Drop-in Ollama alternative in Rust. Pull models, serve streaming inference over gRPC, multi-model with LRU eviction. Single binary, Metal/CUDA.

title: oib/AITBC
summary: AITBC - AI Trusted Blockchain Computing Platform A comprehensive blockchain-based marketplace for AI computing services with zero-knowledge proof verification and confidential transaction support.

title: briandenicola/coin-collection-app
summary: A simple application to track one's coin collection

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: thebardchat/shanebrain_mcp
summary: 42-tool MCP server on a Raspberry Pi 5 — RAG, Weaviate, Ollama, vault, planning, social, security, and system health. Streamable HTTP. Fully local.

title: lopes/datura
summary: An LLM honeypot for detection engineering.

title: cafitac/hermit-agent
summary: Run Claude Code 50–80% cheaper. Hermit is an MCP executor with Codex-first auto routing (codex → z.ai → local), so Claude stays the orchestrator while cheaper models do the heavy lifting.

title: elbruno/openclawnet
summary: 🐾 OpenClawNet — Build an AI Agent Platform in .NET 10 (Reactor live series materials)

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
summary: A hive for your AI agents. Personal per user, shared per project, self-hosted, 24/7. Assistants that outlive your laptop's uptime.

title: askalf/dario
summary: Local LLM router. One endpoint for Claude Max/Pro, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq, Ollama, LiteLLM, any OpenAI-compat URL — your tools don't need to change. OAuth for Claude subscriptions, multi-account pool, MCP server. Zero runtime deps.

title: tmy7533018/mugen-shell
summary: Hyprland + Quickshell shell with Material You theming, video wallpapers, and an integrated AI chat panel (Ollama / Gemini)

title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign
summary: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.

title: thebardchat/mega-crew-stories
summary: Autonomous AI noir audiobook series — 17 bots write, illustrate, and narrate episodes 24/7 on a Pi 5. Live story universe. No humans required.

title: lingcoder/crab-code
summary: 🦀 Open-source alternative to Claude Code, built from scratch in Rust. Agentic coding CLI — thinks, plans, and executes with any LLM. Compatible with Claude Code workflows.

title: CodingWithGrandmaDotCom/coding-with-grandma
summary: Browser-based ESP32 IDE with AI. Zero installs, zero fees. Open a webpage, describe your project, flash your board. For makers, classrooms, and beginners.

title: brandonkindred/Khala-Agentic-AI-Teams
summary: Many Agents, one objective... yours

title: soenneker/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: natuleadan/mcp-memory
summary: Local MCP server compatible with any stdio-based AI client. Provides persistent structured memory, semantic search and reindexing using local embeddings and LanceDB.

title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.
